code:
# Write your MySQL query statement below
SELECT
    p.product_name,
    SUM(o.unit) AS unit
FROM Products p
JOIN Orders o
ON p.product_id = o.product_id
WHERE o.order_date BETWEEN '2020-02-01' AND '2020-02-29'
GROUP BY
    p.product_id,
    p.product_name
HAVING SUM(o.unit) >= 100;
problemName: List the Products Ordered in a Period
